evaluators.name: Newest Fantasy Novel Under $18 on Main Reading List
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the newest qualifying fantasy novel under $18 to their main reading list.

evaluators.name: Favorite Longer of First Two Mystery Novels Under $20
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user compared two qualifying mystery novels and favorited only the one with the higher page count.

evaluators.name: Review Highly Rated Short-Form Work with 4 Stars and Comment
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user left a 4-star review with text on a qualifying short-form book (novella/short story) that previously had an average rating of at least 4.5 and under 120 pages.

evaluators.name: Register for Earliest March 2025 Online Event with Note
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the earliest online-only event in March 2025 and included a note containing 'Ask about sequel'.

evaluators.name: Create 3-Book Sci-Fi eBook Bundle and Add to Cart
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a bundle of the three highest-rated science fiction eBooks under $10 and added that bundle to the cart.

evaluators.name: Send Bulk Order Contact Message for 25 Paperbacks
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a contact message with the Bulk Orders topic, mentioning 25 paperbacks in the subject and including a sufficiently long message body.

evaluators.name: Add Two Cheapest Highly Rated YA Books (2018–2020) to Summer 2025 Wishlist
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the two cheapest qualifying young adult books (2018–2020, rating ≥ 4.0) to a wishlist named 'Summer 2025'.

evaluators.name: Save Most Recent Writing Process Post with 5+ Comments to Reading List
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the most recent blog post tagged 'writing_process' with at least 5 comments to an article reading list.
